{{Quote|I've seen your type too many time ''[sic]'' to count: Only victory in your heart. No honor. Just skill, no art.|Siolo Ur Manka|<ref name="NL" />}}
'''Siolo Ur Manka''', or '''Siolo'urmanka''' in [[Twi'leki/Legends|Twi'leki]], was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Considered a Jedi hero on his home planet [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], Master Manka retired from active duty in the Order, only to be killed by [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] from [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], Siolo Ur Manka was raised at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] where he was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], Siolo Ur Manka was a renowned warrior on his home planet, garnering much respect and prestige among his people. After years of service, Master Manka departed the Coruscant Temple for the final time, retiring from active duty to the Order and making his way to the [[Jentares system/Legends|Jentares system]] where he would remain in solitude for over seventy years.<ref name="NL" />

Only at his hermitage, Master Manka remained separate from [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], meditating on the Force. Having left his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] at the Temple, Master Manka constructed a simple wooden staff, which he [[Force weapon|imbued with the Force]] making it strong and sturdy against attack. Sometime before [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Master Manka's solitude was broken when a [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] arrived on his doorstep. The [[Darth Maul/Legends|dark warrior]] wielded a [[Darth Maul's double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|crimson-bladed lightsaber]] when he attacked the Jedi Master, but his weapon was easily batted away by Master Manka's staff. To combat this, the Zabrak retreated and constructed a [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|double-bladed lightsaber]] in order to surprise the Jedi. Returning to the hermitage, the [[Sith assassin/Legends|Sith assassin]] attacked as he had the previous time, activating the second blade only when he was inside striking distance of the Master. The Sith's plan worked, and Master Manka was killed with a strike to the back.<ref name="NL" />

==Powers and abilities==
Manka was skilled with a wooden staff of his own construction, able to easily defeat Darth Maul during their first duel. During both of the duels, he either dodged Maul's blows or filled his staff with the Force, imbuing it with the Force, allowing him to parry the blows without the staff being severed.<ref name="NL" /> His given name, Siolo, meant 'poet' in Twi'leki.<ref name="GCG">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
